course_title: Practicum in Strength and Conditioning I-b
description:
Offered: Fall
The Practicum course is designed to expose students to the profession of strength and conditioning and to provide experience through the observation of specific protocols of exercise and fitness assessment. Students will be engaged in strength and conditioning activities within the Fitchburg State University Strength and Conditioning facility.
Note: EXSS majors only.
Pre/Concurrent: EXSS 3120
